name: LUNOX 2in1 4-wave Diode Laser & Q-switched ND:YAG Laser Device
shortDescription: 2in1 diode laser + Q-switched ND:YAG in one device. 4 wavelengths, hair removal, tattoo removal, carbon peeling.
description:
LUNOX is not just another laser device – it is a future-proof investment capable of replacing multiple separate devices in cosmetics.

The diode laser and Q-Switched ND:YAG technology together cover the most sought-after, most profitable services, so with LUNOX you can build your entire treatment portfolio with a single device.
metaTitle: LUNOX 2in1 Diode Laser & Q-switched ND:YAG Device
metaDescription: LUNOX 2in1 diode laser and ND:YAG laser in one – fast ROI, scar-free treatments, intelligent settings, and official training with certificate.

videoDescription.headline: LUNOX – Two Technologies, Unlimited Possibilities
paragraphs: LUNOX is not just another laser device – it is a future-proof investment capable of replacing multiple separate devices in cosmetics.

The diode laser and Q-Switched ND:YAG technology together cover the most sought-after, most profitable services: hair removal, tattoo removal, pigment treatment, carbon peeling, and skin rejuvenation.
With LUNOX you can build your entire treatment portfolio with a single device – one device instead of many, with fast ROI.

featureRows.headline: Why is LUNOX worth it?
featureRows.subtitle: Two of the most sought-after technologies in a single device – maximum ROI

features.title: Diode laser hair removal – on 4 wavelengths
features.description:
Effective, lasting hair removal on all skin types (phototype I–VI).

Wavelengths:

755 nm – light, fine hair
808 nm – universal, average root depth
940 nm – darker hair
1064 nm – deep-rooted hair

Painless, fast, and client-friendly procedure thanks to -4°C cooling.

features.title: Q-Switched ND:YAG – tattoo and pigment removal
features.description:
The LUNOX Q-switched ND:YAG laser provides a sharp, concentrated spot mark, strong energy delivery, and stable pulse at every treatment.
1064 nm and 532 nm wavelengths
Up to 1600 mJ power
3–5 ns pulse duration – scar-free treatment
Black, blue, brown, green, red, and yellow pigments
features.highlight: American Coherent laser rod guarantees stable, reliable operation for years.

features.title: Carbon peeling – the Hollywood treatment
features.description:
The combination of the 1320 nm handpiece and Q-Switched pulse enables a premium facial treatment with black carbon mask.
Deep pore cleansing
Regulates sebum production
Reduces inflammation
Immediately smoother, fresher skin surface

features.title: Smart diode laser – intelligent parameter setting
features.description:
The built-in intelligent software automatically recognizes the selected treatment parameters and independently sets optimal values.
Skin type (phototype I–VI)
Treatment area
Hair quality and quantity

Automatically sets power, frequency, pulse duration, and cooling value.

features.title: One device instead of many – maximum ROI
features.description:
You don't need to buy a separate diode laser, pigment laser, or tattoo removal laser – LUNOX offers all of this in a single compact device.
Hair removal
Tattoo removal
Pigmentation treatment
Carbon peeling
Skin rejuvenation and rejuvenation
features.highlight: With LUNOX, you can recover the full purchase price in just a few months.

training.headline: Operator Training – Comprehensive Training Program
training.intro: A comprehensive training program is available for the LUNOX device, fully preparing operators for safe and effective use. The course is officially approved in the FAR system, with the involvement of physicians and healthcare educators.
items: Theoretical and practical overview of diode laser and Q-switched ND:YAG technology
Treatment protocols for different skin types and conditions
Marketing and pricing recommendations for successful salon use
closingParagraphs: After completing the course, you receive an official, personalized certificate confirming mastery of professional LUNOX device operation.
The goal is that you receive not just a device, but real, practical knowledge and business support.

faq.question: Why choose a 2in1 device?
faq.answer: LUNOX combines diode laser hair removal and Q-switched ND:YAG technology in a single device. You don't need separate devices – hair removal, tattoo removal, pigment treatment, carbon peeling, and skin rejuvenation can all be performed with one device, representing significant cost savings.

faq.question: How quickly does LUNOX pay for itself?
faq.answer: Diode laser hair removal and ND:YAG treatments are among the most profitable cosmetic services. With 3-5 clients per day, LUNOX typically pays for itself within 2-4 months. Use our ROI calculator for exact figures!

faq.question: What pigments can the ND:YAG component treat?
faq.answer: The Q-switched ND:YAG laser effectively treats black, blue, brown, green, red, and yellow pigments with 1064 nm and 532 nm wavelengths. It can be used for both body tattoo and permanent makeup removal.

faq.question: What training is included with LUNOX?
faq.answer: A comprehensive training program approved in the FAR system, developed with physician involvement. The training is free with device purchase and concludes with an official certificate.

faq.question: Can I view the device before purchasing?
faq.answer: Yes! You can view and test LUNOX in person at our showroom (Erd, Budai ut 28.) by prior appointment.

whatsIncluded: Q-switched ND:YAG handpieces (1064 nm, 532 nm, 1320 nm)
